_comment: Copy this file to ~/.config/aria/config.json and fill in your own tokens. See SETUP.md for instructions on obtaining each value.

_notes.accessToken: Bearer JWT from beta.music.apple.com (DevTools → Network → Authorization header). Rotates frequently; the service will auto-refresh if omitted.
_notes.mediaUserToken: From a logged-in Apple Music web session (DevTools → Application → Cookies → media-user-token).
_notes.devicePath: Optional. If omitted, the service scans $ARIA_WVD_DIR (~/.config/aria/wvd) for a *.wvd file.
